title: Scoping call
description: We get on a call. You describe the problem, I ask hard questions, and we decide together whether this is a fit. If it's not, I'll tell you — and usually point you somewhere better.

title: Written SOW + 50% upfront
description: I send a written scope: deliverables, timeline, what's in, what's out, what I need from you. Fixed price. You approve and send 50%; I start that week.

title: Weekly shipped demos
duration: Every Friday, for the full engagement
description: Every Friday you get a Loom walkthrough + a link to real running code. No monthly status docs, no surprises — if something's off-track, you see it the week it happens.

title: Production handoff
description: Code in your repo, running on your infra, handoff doc, 2-week bug-fix window. You own everything. No retainer trap.
